# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent istio egress unrestricted.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.example.com
  - db.example.com
  addresses:
  - 192.0.2.0/24
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
  endpoints:
  - address: api.example.com
    ports:
      https: 443
  - address: db.example.com
    ports:
      https: 443

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis-routing
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.example.com
  - db.example.com
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /api
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.example.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /db
    route:
    - destination:
        host: db.example.com
        port:
          number: 443

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis-access
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: your-app
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: ["*"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
        paths: ["/api/*", "/db/*"]
  action: ALLOW

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: api-credentials
type: Opaque
data:
  username: <base64-encoded-username>
  password: <base64-encoded-password>
